caption: A man wearing a dark suit jacket over a white shirt and a dark tie stands on a stage in front of a large digital screen. The screen displays the title "INDUSTRIAL MACHINE LEARNING" in large capital letters. Below the title, a smaller image of the man is shown alongside his name, "Alejandro Saucedo," and several professional titles: "CTO Exponential Technologies," "Chairmen The Institute for Ethical AI & ML," "Fellow (AI, Data & ML) The RSA," and "Co-Founder TeenstrAI.com Initiative." At the bottom of the screen, the text "CONTACT ME AT: A@E-X.IO" is visible. A white banner at the bottom of the scene features the "europython" logo and the text "Edinburgh 23 29 July 2018." As the sequence progresses, the man remains in a similar position on stage, gesturing slightly with his hands while speaking to an unseen audience.
